task: Fix: matrix only uses first N values — need random subset selection per puzzle

notes.message: Root cause: generateLatinSquare(3,3) produces permutations of [0,1,2]. With 9 shape values, only circle/square/triangle (indices 0-2) ever appear in the matrix. Distractors use the full list though, so new shapes appear only as wrong answers. Fix: for each enabled attribute, randomly pick cols-many values from the full list, then Latin-square over those. This also makes distractors use only the same subset (for single-swap) to keep puzzles solvable.

Fix applied: added selectValueSubsets() that picks N random values from each attribute's full list (where N = grid cols). generateDistributionMatrix now returns { matrix, subsets } and maps Latin-square indices through the random subset. multiSwapDistractors and randomCombinationDistractors now receive subsets so they draw from the puzzle's vocabulary. singleSwapDistractors still uses the full value list for visually distinct wrong answers. tsc+vite build clean.
